title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow that chains Claude Opus for planning and integration, Gemini Flash for UI design, and coordination via Archon. The approach leverages each model's strengths to generate beautiful frontends rapidly with Clerk CLI integration and deployment automation.
